posts.author: Alexandre_N (NOTEBAERT Alexandre)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
On the solution we have developped for our process, we have to create a project with differents steps depending of his type into a group. When we create this project, by automation, I canduplicate it but unfortunatelly it’s not possible to rename it directly. We have to do it manually then.

Do you planned to have the possibility to rename a group by automation ?

BR’s
Alexandre
